Agios Panteleimon Greek Orthodox Church

Roof Restoration Project

Our church roof has developed serious leaks and deterioration that urgently need repair. Help us protect this home of worship for the next generation.

The Damage

What the Roof Looks Like Today

These photos were taken during a recent inspection and show the extent of the deterioration our roof has suffered.

Lifted flashing at the roof edge, inspected by hand
Cracked tile and torn underlayment along the ridge
Torn underlayment with a hole, debris filling the cavity near a roof vent
Split underlayment letting dirt and debris into the roof cavity
Torn membrane with a hole through to the cavity below
Deteriorated sarking deep in the roof cavity, between battens
The Need

A Roof in Need of Urgent Repair

For over five decades, our church has stood as a home of faith and a gathering place for the Greek community of Goulburn and districts. It has sheltered baptisms, weddings, feast days and countless Sunday liturgies.

Recently, the roof has developed serious leaks and deterioration that now require major repair work. Left unaddressed, this damage threatens the structure our parish has cared for since the 1970s.

Every dollar raised through this appeal goes directly toward replacing the church roof. Your support, in whatever form, helps ensure this church remains strong and safe for generations to come.

Help Us Keep Our Church Strong and Safe

Other Ways to Give

If you would prefer to support the roof restoration directly rather than through the raffle, you are welcome to make a donation by bank transfer. Every contribution, large or small, goes straight toward the cost of repairing and replacing the roof, and helps us complete the work sooner so the church stays safe and dry for our parish and for the wider Goulburn Greek community.

If you have any questions about donating, or would like a receipt for your records, please get in touch with us via our Facebook page and we will be happy to help.
